title: CorSeaCare
label_config:
<!-- Label Studio labeling config for CorSeaCare microplastic annotation (6 classes).
     Paste into: Project → Labeling Setup → Custom template. --><View>
  <Image name="image" value="$image" zoom="true" zoomControl="true" rotateControl="false"/>
  <RectangleLabels name="label" toName="image" strokeWidth="2">
    <Label value="fragment" background="#e6194b"/>
    <Label value="fibre" background="#3c44b4"/>
    <Label value="film" background="#61bfd6"/>
    <Label value="mousse" background="#f58231"/>
    <Label value="pellet" background="#911eb4"/>
    <Label value="matiere_organique" background="#07b64a"/>
  </RectangleLabels>
</View>
